title: stachys glechomifolia
intro: Stachys glechomifolia, also known as Wood Betony or Stachys, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the mint family Lamiaceae. Traditionally, Stachys glechomifolia has been used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and improve digestion, thanks to its high concentration of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Stachys glechomifolia include its potential to alleviate headaches, improve mental clarity, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, Stachys glechomifolia can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health issues and promote overall well-being.
